name: 臺灣特有種鳥類觀測手札 Field Journal of Taiwan’s Endemic Birds
description: 扮演野生動物觀察家，穿梭於臺灣海拔山林，用手繪與對焦快門，採集並記錄 32 種珍貴的臺灣特有種鳥類。 / Act as a wildlife observer exploring Taiwan's elevation forests to collect and record 32 precious endemic bird species with focal shutters and hand-drawn sketched illustration canvases.
